---
title: Categories
comments: false
toc: false
---

This site uses six audience-facing categories.
Language is handled separately with tags (`lang-kor`, `lang-eng`).

## Clinical Trial Design

Methodology for protocol planning, hypothesis strategy, estimands, adaptive designs, and covariate adjustment.

- [Adjustment of Baseline Covariates in Randomized Controlled Trial](/posts/Adjustment_of_Baseline_Covariates/)
- [Connection between noncomparative adaptive design and estimand framework](/posts/Noncomparative_adaptive_design_estimand_framework/)
- [Switching noninferiority and superiority trial](/posts/switching_noninferiority_superiority/)

## Regulatory Science

FDA/MFDS/ICH-focused interpretation posts, with practical implications for submissions.

- [FDA Guidance Digest](/guidance-watch/)
- [Considerations for the use of the Plausible Mechanism Framework to Develop Individualized Therapies that Target Specific Genetic Conditions with Known Biological Cause](/posts/Considerations_for_the_use_of_the_Plausible_Mechanism_Framework_to_Develop_Indiv/)
- [식약처 의료기기 임상관련 통계업무](/posts/Medical-Device-Biostatistician-Work/)

## Real World Evidence

RWE strategy, causal inference, and non-interventional evidence design.

- [Use of Real-World Evidence to Support Regulatory Decision-Making for Medical Devices](/posts/RWE_medical_device_FDA/)
- [Considerations Regarding Non-Interventional Studies for Drug and Biological Products Guidance for Industry](/posts/Considerations_Regarding_Non-Interventional_Studies_for_Drug_and_Biological_Products_Guidance_for_Industry/)
- [RWE guideline week1 causal inference](/posts/RWE_guideline_week1/)

## Medical AI

AI/ML in clinical research, diagnostic performance metrics, and model evaluation context.

- [FDA Guidance Statistical Guidance on Reporting Results from Studies Evaluating Diagnostic Tests](/posts/FDA-Guidance-Statistical-Guidance-on-Reporting-Results-from-Studies-Evaluating-Diagnostic-Tests_Translated/)
- [FDA Perspective on the Regulation of AI in Health Care and Biomedicine](/posts/FDA-Perspective-on-the-Regulation-of-AI-in-Health-Care-and-Biomedicine_Review/)
- [Speical ROC Curves](/posts/Special_ROC_Curves/)

## Statistics Fundamentals

Core concepts and explainers for broader technical literacy.

- [Standard deviation and standard error](/posts/standard_deviation_error_eng/)
- [표준편차와 표준오차](/posts/standard_deviation_error/)
- [통계적 우월성 검정 가설 설정 (단측 검정 vs 양측 검정)](/posts/Hypothesis-Setting-in-Statistical-Superiority/)

## Notes & Reads

Book notes, career reflections, and personal/professional commentary.

- [Neuroscience to Read Before You Get Stupid](/posts/Neuroscience_to_Read_Before_You_Get_Stupid_ENG/)
- [국내 임상통계 관련 진로 소개](/posts/Biostat_career_in_korea/)
- [Fisher와 Tea Tasting Lady](/posts/Fisher_and_Tea-Tasting-Lady/)
